title: The Elders Hunt the Broadcast
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Vegapunk, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and that brought me to what proved to be my first grave sin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am seeing to it now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must preserve the contents of that room!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am almost there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was fixated on my dream of developing an everlasting energy source,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hellbent on Driving...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the world to a bigger and brighter future...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: UGGH...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: The Mother Flame!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But I flew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...too close to the sun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We have to eradicate all lifeforms...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: glue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Not yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...We must be relentless!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I shouldn't get ahead of myself though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's no use!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nothing's working!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stomp

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In order to understand...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is it?! we didn't even faze it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: YOUCH! That's hot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DA HYA HYA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...where the world is heading...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be burned to a crisp if we don't hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must first address the past, specifically what happened...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Between 900 and 800 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A century long period that most think of as a blank part of history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those miserable marines! What are they doing?! Hurry and shut this cretin's mouth!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fittingly, it is known as the void century since all information about it has either been erased or lost...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that is true for the most part, but there is one last key to unlocking some scraps and echoes from back then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: DEATH IS TOO GOOD FOR HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring back his body! I'll tear him limb from limb!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Void century? What is he talking about???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The PoneGlyphs! Those lonely stones dwelling in various quiet and calm lands all over the globe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The text inscribed on them, once decoded, is our one and only method...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: DERS!!! Shi sh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...of glimpsing this unknown past.

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
